mapper.sql: select c.comment_id, c.user_id, c.type, c.target_id, c.content, c.status, c.create_time, c.update_time, coalesce(nullif(u.user_name, ''), nullif(u.login_name, ''), concat('用户', c.user_id)) as user_name, u.avatar, date_format(c.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as create_time_text, case when c.type = '1' then l.title when c.type = '2' then a.title else '' end as target_title, case when c.type = '1' then '课程' when c.type = '2' then '文章' else '未知' end as type_name from study_comment c left join sys_user u on u.user_id = c.user_id left join study_lesson l on c.type = '1' and c.target_id = l.lesson_id left join study_article a on c.type = '2' and c.target_id = a.article_id
mapper.insert: insert into study_comment ( user_id, type, target_id, content, status, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createTime} )
mapper.update: update study_comment set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where comment_id = #{commentId}

update study_comment set status = #{status}, update_time = now() where comment_id in
#{commentId}
